title: 🧊 Fractal Polytope Collapse
name: Fractal Polytope Collapse
what_it_is: When higher-dimensional shapes (polytopes) collapse or unfold into lower dimensions—like a 4D being expressing itself in 3D fragments.
how_to_use: her body is the collapse of a 4D polytope—visible shards of dimension shift as she moves
the glyph pulses—each flash a partial unfold of the hidden fractal polytope within
animation_behavior: Shapes fold and unfold, flicker between forms, presence shifts with angle of view
